song.title: Multiply Your Love
song.author: Andy Park
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E Esus E Esus E Multiply Your love through us . Esus E Esus E To the lost and the least. . C#m7 Bsus B Let us be Your healing hands, Your instruments of peace. . A C#m7 May our single purpose be to live out Your life. . Bsus A Through our simple words and deeds . E Esus E Let love be multiplied!
[V2] Multiply Your love through me to someone in need. Help me Lord to freely give this grace that I’ve received. Let my single purpose be to live out Your life. Through my simple words and deeds let love be multiplied!
[V3] Multiply Your church through us to the ends of the earth. Where there’s only barrenness, let us see new birth. Use us as Your laborers working side by side. Let us see Your harvest come! Let love be multiplied!
